mapper.select: select '时' as txt, 4 id from dual union all select '日' as txt, 1 id from dual union all select '周' as txt, 2 id from dual union all select '月' as txt, 3 id from dual

select count(*) num from ( select org_time as w1, link_name as w2, link_speed as w3", in_avg_speed as w4, in_max_speed as w5, in_avg_ratio as w6, in_max_ratio as w7, out_avg_speed as w8, out_max_speed as w9, out_avg_ratio as w10, out_max_ratio as w11 from iptaw_perf_link where 1=1 and org_time > to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and org_time < to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and link_name='空港物流IDC' and sum_level= #{sum_level} and port_flag= 3 order by org_time )

select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from ( select org_time as w1, link_name as w2, link_speed as w3", in_avg_speed as w4, in_max_speed as w5, in_avg_ratio as w6, in_max_ratio as w7, out_avg_speed as w8, out_max_speed as w9, out_avg_ratio as w10, out_max_ratio as w11 from iptaw_perf_link where 1=1 and org_time > to_date(#{time1},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and org_time < to_date(#{time2},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and link_name='空港物流IDC' and sum_level= #{sum_level} and port_flag= 3 order by org_time ) a ) Where m_rowNum > ${BegeinIndex} and m_rowNum <= ${EndIndex}
